name: Solidus Milestone M1 - Foundation and Data Model
description: Establish package contracts, persistence schema, and customer registration primitives for Solidus.

userStories.title: Create package skeleton and core contracts
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a clear package structure and core interfaces so Stripe and framework adapters can evolve safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Create package structure: core, stripe, express, sequelize, and facade packages
Define core interfaces for customer registry, repositories, queue adapter, and event bus
Define error taxonomy including ActionRequiredError and ProviderError
Add contract tests for interface behavior with fake adapters
Publish generated public API docs for core contracts
userStories.notes: Completed package skeleton, core contracts, error taxonomy, contract tests, and generated core API docs (docs/core-contracts.api.md). Verified with bun test and bunx tsc --noEmit.

userStories.title: Implement Sequelize schema and migrations
userStories.description: As a platform engineer, I want durable billing projections and idempotency constraints so webhook processing remains consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement models for customers, subscriptions, charges, payment methods, webhooks, and merchants
Add unique constraints and indexes for idempotency and default semantics
Provide migration templates and integration instructions
Pass migration up and down tests on PostgreSQL
Pass constraint tests preventing duplicate processor_id and event_id
userStories.notes: Completed SQL-first schema artifacts for merchants, customers, subscriptions, charges, payment_methods, and webhooks with required unique and partial indexes. Added migration templates, ERD/schema docs, and migration artifact tests.

userStories.title: Build customer model registration API
userStories.description: As a TypeScript developer, I want a pay_customer-equivalent registration API so application models can safely map to billing customers.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement owner resolution and client-reference safety helpers
Add examples for User model integration
Pass unit tests for registration, default selection, and owner resolution failures
Publish API docs including migration guidance from Pay semantics
userStories.notes: Completed registerCustomerModel API, in-memory registry, owner resolution guardrails, and client reference safety helpers. Added unit tests and Pay migration guidance in generated docs.
